case_title: CHOW KANG LAM VS. ANDREW T.Y. KHAW

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY LAM, CHOW KANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, CHOW KANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAW, ANDREW T.Y. $7,189.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,339.50, DEFENDANT ANDREW T.Y. KHAW NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,489.00 FILED BY LAM, CHOW KANG AS TO DEFENDANT KHAW, ANDREW T.Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LAM, CHOW KANG
RETURN OF CLAIM SENT TO ANDREW T.Y. KHAW, PERSON NO LOMGER LIVES AT THE LOCATION.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
